name: OAK Select POP
description: The OAK Select POP can receive point cloud data.

parameters.name: Active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: When enabled, data from the specified OAK Device CHOP will be retrieved.

parameters.name: OAK Device CHOP
parameters.label: OAK Device CHOP
parameters.description: Reference to the OAK Device CHOP running a depthai pipeline.

parameters.name: Stream
parameters.label: Stream
parameters.description: The name of the stream to be received.

parameters.name: Cache Size
parameters.label: Cache Size
parameters.description: The Cache Size parameter works like the Queue Size parameter on the OAK Select CHOP. Picking 2 is a good default choice because it enables TouchDesigner to show an image to the user while asynchronously writing new data into the remaining buffer.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the live OAK_Select_POP wiki page
